description_long: This object is a short, double-edged dagger with a dark metallic blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade is robust and straight, featuring a central ridge for added strength. The handle is cylindrical and appears to be made of polished wood, with a reddish-brown hue and subtle grain patterns visible. A circular guard separates the blade from the handle, providing protection for the user's hand. The handle is capped with a flat pommel, giving it a balanced and sturdy appearance. The overall design is simple and functional, with no visible decorative elements.
description: A double-edged, pointed dagger with a dark metal blade and a polished wooden handle separated by a circular guard. The design is robust and utilitarian, with a reddish-brown handle and no ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the double-edged blade and the cylindrical wooden handle with a circular guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed tip of the blade and the circular cross-section of the guard and handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, displaying the blade's profile and the handle's length.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the flat pommel of the handle and the broad base of the blade.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, polished wood, flat pommel, no visible grip texture
